location.placeindex.datasourceconfigurat: Specifies the data storage option requesting Places.

location.placeindex.datasourceconfigurat.Description: Specifies how the results of an operation will be stored by the caller.   Valid values include:  + `SingleUse` specifies that the results won't be stored. + `Storage` specifies that the result can be cached or stored in a database.Default value: `SingleUse`
